_note: Product metadata for Ramnarine Sambhudat (Shako) cricket titles. Fields verified against the physical books and public listings (Amazon, eBay, author site) as of June 2026. Items flagged 'verify' should be confirmed before publishing.

author.origin: Crabwood Creek, Corentyne Coast, Berbice, Guyana (South America)
author.bio_short: Guyanese cricket statistician and lifelong fan of the game who compiles reference records on Test cricket.

products.title: WI in Test Matches: Facts and Feats 1928–2013
title_variants: West Indies in Test Matches, Facts and Feats, June 1928 – December 2013
products.subtitle: Facts and Feats 1928 – 2013
products.author: Ramnarine Sambhudat (Shako)
products.subject: Sports & Recreation / Cricket
products.audience: Cricket fans, statisticians, West Indies cricket historians, collectors
products.description: A statistical reference on West Indies Test cricket spanning the side's first Test (vs England, June 1928) to its 2013 series in New Zealand. Compiled by Guyanese fan Ramnarine Sambhudat and forewarded by WI great Lance Gibbs, it gathers records across batting, bowling, wicket-keeping, fielding, partnerships, all-round and individual feats; WI records for and against every Test nation; all WI captains and openers; every WI cricketer from 1928–2013 with statistics; Guyanese and East Indian contributions to WI cricket; and every century scored by and against the West Indies. 551 pages with 86 photographs.

shipping_estimate.weight_note: 551-page 6x9 paperback; weigh one copy to confirm before setting carrier rates

products.title: Test Cricket Records from March 1877 – September 2019
title_variants: Figures Are Fun – Test Cricket Records from March 1877 – September 2019
products.tagline: Figures Are Fun — Follow Them With
products.author: Ramnarine Sambhudat (Shako)
products.publisher: Self-published (independent; 0-578 ISBN block, typically distributed via IngramSpark) — verify
products.subject: Sports & Recreation / Cricket
products.audience: Cricket fans worldwide, statisticians, Test cricket historians, collectors
products.description: The author's second reference, broadening the lens from the West Indies to all twelve Test-playing nations across the full span of Test cricket — from the inaugural match in March 1877 to September 2019. Forewarded by Lance Gibbs, it presents records and figures nation by nation (England, Australia, South Africa, West Indies, India, New Zealand, Pakistan, Sri Lanka, Zimbabwe, Bangladesh, Afghanistan and Ireland), with each country represented by a signature player. 561 pages, 6x9.

shipping_estimate.weight_note: 561-page 6x9 paperback; weigh one copy to confirm before setting carrier rates
